TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking B3 A Brother's Anguish in the World of 1980.
changeReason: The fragment title changed from 'Suffering of a Big Brother' to 'A Brother's Anguish' (Japanese: 兄の苦悩). 'Big Brother' vs 'Brother' loses the specificity of an older sibling, and 'Suffering' vs 'Anguish' has a different connotation. These are proper nouns used for navigation.

TextENGNew:
B5 The Second 'Specimen' in the World of 1980
H3 Mion Sonozaki in the World of Friends
...After viewing the above fragments, this one will become available.
changeReason: The fragment title changed from 'Second Specimen' to 'The Second Specimen,' and 'pieces' was changed to 'fragments' (Japanese: カケラ means fragments). The term 'fragments' is the standard translation used for this game mechanic.

TextENGNew:
And—
E2 Footsteps of the Fourth Year in the World of 1982
E3 The Club's Formation in the World of 1982
...These fragments are also connected to its appearance.
changeReason: Fragment titles changed: 'Footsteps in the Fourth Year' to 'Footsteps of the Fourth Year' and 'Formation of a Club' to 'The Club's Formation.' Also 'involved in their unlocking' vs 'connected to its appearance' shifts the described relationship between fragments.
